version_description: Charted by a pianist. Simplified chords. Added punctuation for cadence.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[Hook Bassline]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]   x2

[Spoken]
N.C.
Yo, VIP - Let's kick it!

[Hook Bassline]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]   x2
(Ice, Ice Baby - Ice, Ice Baby)[/tab]
(Ice, Ice Baby - Ice, Ice Baby)


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
All right stop - collaborate and listen[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Ice is back with my brand new invention[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Something - grabs a hold of me tightly[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Flowin like a harpoon daily and nightly[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Will it ever stop, yo - I don't know[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Turn off the lights - and I'll glow[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]    N.C.
To the extreme I rock a mic like a vandal[/tab]
N.C.
Light up a stage and wax a chump like a candle

[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Dance -- bum rush the speaker that booms[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
I'm killin' your brain like a poisonous mushroom[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Deadly - when I play a dope melody[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Anything less than the best is a felony[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Love it or leave it, you better gain way[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
You better hit bull's eye, the kid don't play[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
If there was a problem, yo, I'll solve it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Check out the hook while my DJ revolves it[/tab]


[Chorus]
[Hook Bassline]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
(Ice, Ice Baby - Vanilla Ice, Ice Baby)  x4[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Now that the party is jumping[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G5[/ch]
With the bass kicked in, and the fingers are pumpin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Quick to the point, to the point no faking[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Cooking MC's like a pound of bacon[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Burning them - if they're not quick and nimble[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
I go crazy when I hear a cymbal[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D5[/ch]
And a hi hat - with a souped up tempo[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
I'm on a roll - it's time to go solo[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Rollin - in my 5.0[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G5[/ch]
With my ragtop down so my hair can blow[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D5[/ch]
The girlies on standby, waving just to say "hi"[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
- Did you stop, naw - I just drove by[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Kept on - pursuing to the next stop[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
- I bust a left and I'm heading to the next block[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
- The block was dead, yo - so I continued to[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
A1A - Beachfront Avenue![/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Girls were hot wearing less than bikinis[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Rockman lovers driving Lamborghinis[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Jealous - cuz I'm out getting mine[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Shay with a guage and Vanilla with a nine[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Ready - for the chumps on the wall[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
The Chumps are acting ill because they're full of eight balls[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Gunshots - rang out like a bell[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
I grabbed my nine - all I heard were shells[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Fallin - on the concrete real fast[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Jumped in my car - slammed on the gas[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Bumper to bumper - the avenue's packed[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G5[/ch]
I'm tryin to get away before the jackers jack[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Police on the scene - you know what I mean[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
They passed me up - confronted all the dope fiends[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
If there was a problem, yo, I'll solve it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Check out the hook while my DJ revolves it[/tab]


[Chorus]
[Hook Bassline]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
(Ice, Ice Baby - Vanilla Ice, Ice Baby)  x4[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Take heed - 'cuz I'm a lyrical poet[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Miami's on the scene just in case you didn't know it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
My town - that created all the bass sound[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
- Enough to shake and kick holes in the ground[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D5[/ch]
'Cuz my style's like a chemical spill[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G5[/ch]
Feasible rhymes you can vision and feel[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Conducted and formed, this is a hell of a concept[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
- We make it hype - and you want to step[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
With this - Shay plays on the fade[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Slice like a ninja, cut like a razor blade[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
so fast - other DJ's say, "Damn"[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G5[/ch]
If my rhyme was a drug I'd sell it by the gram[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Keep my composure when it's time to get loose[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Magnetized by the mic while I kick my juice[/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
If there was a problem, yo, I'll solve it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Check out the hook while my DJ revolves it[/tab]


[Chorus]
[Hook Bassline]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Yo man--let's get out of here![/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch]
Word to your mother![/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Ice Ice baby, too cold[/tab]
